summary: Keep flight-goat's module file tidy after the catalog Go 1.26.4 floor update.
reason: Govulncheck loads each published CLI module before scanning. With go 1.26.4 already declared, the redundant toolchain go1.26.4 line made `go list` report that go.mod needed tidying, which failed the repository-wide Govulncheck job before vulnerability analysis could complete.
validated_outcome: `go list ./...` from library/travel/flight-goat succeeds after `go mod tidy` removes the redundant toolchain directive.
